positive: A majestic, ethereal illustration of a celestial dragon coiled around a glowing moon. The dragon's scales should be iridescent and metallic, set against a nebula backdrop of deep purples and golds. Cinematic fantasy art, highly detailed digital painting, epic scale, trending on ArtStation.
